summary: Iteration 8: Onboarding Wizard testing completed successfully. All 14 features tested and verified working. Backend API (POST /api/users/me/complete-onboarding) passes all tests. Frontend wizard appears for new users, shows all 4 steps correctly, and persists completion state.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/signup creates user with onboarding_completed=false
Backend: POST /api/users/me/complete-onboarding sets onboarding_completed=true
Backend: POST /api/users/me/complete-onboarding requires authentication (returns 401/403 without token)
Backend: Complete-onboarding is idempotent (can be called multiple times)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me includes onboarding_completed field
Backend: Login response includes onboarding_completed in user object
Frontend: Onboarding wizard appears for new users (onboarding_completed=false) on dashboard
Frontend: Step 1 Welcome screen shows personalized greeting with user's first name
Frontend: Step 1 has 'Let's Go' button and 'Skip' button
Frontend: Step 2 Use Case selection shows all 6 clickable cards (SaaS, E-Commerce, Dashboard, API, Mobile, Other)
Frontend: Step 2 has Back button visible
Frontend: Step 3 Feature Tour shows 4 feature cards (AI Code Gen, Templates, Security, Deploy)
Frontend: Step 4 Completion screen shows 'You're Ready!' with 'Start Building' button
Frontend: Progress bar animates correctly across 4 steps
Frontend: Step indicator dots update correctly
Frontend: 'Start Building' button calls complete-onboarding and dismisses wizard
Frontend: Skip button on step 1 calls complete-onboarding and dismisses wizard
Frontend: Wizard does NOT appear after reload (onboarding_completed=true persisted)
Frontend: Credit Meter visible on dashboard header after onboarding
Frontend: Success toast 'You're all set! Let's build something amazing.' shown after completion
Regression: Landing page loads correctly
Regression: Login page works with Forgot password link
Regression: Signup page works with social login options
Regression: Pricing page shows plan options
Regression: Templates page requires authentication
critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingWizard component properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Wizard correctly checks user.onboarding_completed in DashboardPage useEffect
refreshUser() is called after completion to update user state
Progress bar animation uses framer-motion with smooth width transitions
Backend endpoint correctly updates MongoDB with onboarding_completed=true

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all wizard steps and regression tests passed)

test_credentials.note: Created multiple test users with TEST_/test_ prefix during testing

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created for onboarding flow testing with unique emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding wizard fully tested and working. New users see 4-step wizard on dashboard: Welcome (personalized greeting), Use Case Selection (6 options), Feature Tour (4 features), Completion. Both 'Start Building' and 'Skip' buttons call POST /api/users/me/complete-onboarding and dismiss wizard. Wizard does not reappear after completion. Credit Meter shows on dashboard header. All previous features (2FA, password reset, landing page, settings) continue to work correctly.
mocked_apis_note: No APIs are mocked - all functionality is real implementation
